title: 20:01 ГўВЂВ” January 10, 2020
body_text:
20:01 ГўВЂВ” January 10, 2020
PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў Direct Part Update
PaymentStream
Direct users can add and delete Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) accounts for tax payment and filing purposes on behalf of a member for the following five forms:
ГўВЂВў	GST/HST 34 Filing and Remittances
ГўВЂВў	GST/HST Amount Owing Remittances (RC159)
ГўВЂВў	GST/HST Interim Payments Remittances (RC160)
ГўВЂВў	CRA Corporation Taxes (RC159/RC160)
ГўВЂВў	Payroll and Source Deductions ГўВЂВ“ Current Year
We added procedures for this into Chapter 8,
PaymentStream
ГўВ„Вў Direct Bill Payments Functions of the PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў Direct Part. The procedures only apply when the credit union is using the member serving state to make a payment or filing for a member on one of these five CRA forms. These procedures do not apply to credit unions that use the Business Taxes application to process CRA business tax payments and filings.
Electronic Transactions Volume
